cards.title: Anthropic Revenue Hits $47B Annualized Ahead of IPO
cards.body: Anthropic's annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. The company faces a real test maintaining this breakneck growth trajectory.

cards.title: Alphabet Raises Record $85B for Google's AI Business
cards.body: Alphabet completed a record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signaling strong investor appetite for AI-related offerings. The massive raise demonstrates investor confidence in AI's commercial potential.

cards.title: Google Expands AI Search with Publisher Opt-Out Option
cards.body: U.K. regulators are requiring Google to offer publishers a tool to opt out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

cards.title: Apple Approves Poke as First AI Agent for Messages
cards.body: Poke became the first AI agent approved for Apple's Messages for Business platform. The startup enables users to interact with AI agents through simple text messages.

cards.title: Meta Rolls Out AI Creator Assistant on Facebook
cards.body: Meta launched a new AI creator assistant that helps Facebook creators get quick answers about their performance. Creators can now ask questions like 'When should I post?' instead of parsing through dashboards.

cards.title: Google's Dreambeans Turns Your Life Into Cartoons
cards.body: Dreambeans is Google's new AI tool that creates illustrated 'stories' from personal data in your Google account. The weirdly-named tool curates AI-generated content personalized to individual users.

cards.title: Lovable Signs $5x Google Cloud Expansion Deal
cards.body: Lovable and Google signed a multiyear deal expanding Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud by 5x. The deal includes expanded access to Anthropic's Claude AI model.

cards.title: AirTrunk Commits $30B to Build AI Data Centers
cards.body: Australian data center operator AirTrunk plans to set up 5GW of capacity in India. The massive investment signals continued infrastructure buildout for AI computing demands.

cards.title: Amazon Uses AI to Generate Product Search Images
cards.body: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images matching user search queries. The retailer says the feature helps guide users to relevant products.

cards.title: Meta Builds Data Centers Inside Tents to Cut Costs
cards.body: Meta found a novel way to reduce its massive data center bill by building facilities in tents. The cost-cutting approach reflects industry pressure to manage AI infrastructure expenses.

cards.title: Hello Robot Releases Stretch Fourth Generation
cards.body: Hello Robot released the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch. The California startup is positioning itself as ready to bring robots into consumer homes.

cards.title: Airbnb CEO Plans to Launch New AI Lab
cards.body: Brian Chesky announced Airbnb will launch a new AI lab. The CEO previously said Airbnb hasn't partnered with an LLM because existing products weren't quite ready.

cards.title: AI Cost Crisis Prompts Industry Guardrail Shift
cards.body: Industry conversation shifted from 'tokenmaxxing' to managing AI's runaway costs and implementing guardrails. Companies are prioritizing cost control over rapid scaling growth strategies.

cards.title: Voice AI Startup Handles 17K Daily Calls in Africa
cards.body: Two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for overlooked African and Middle Eastern markets. Their startup's proprietary stack now handles over 17,000 calls daily.

cards.title: Apple's App Store Generates $1.4 Trillion Annually
cards.body: Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion last year. Digital goods sales reached $149 billion with 90% of transactions without Apple's commission.

cards.title: WWDC 2026: Siri Revamp and Apple Intelligence Updates
cards.body: Apple's WWDC 2026 will feature Siri's highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates. The event is shaping up to showcase significant AI integration across Apple products.

cards.title: Together Tech Wave Emerges as 2026 Startup Trend
cards.body: While AI fundraising hits record highs, some founders are building 'together tech' that gets people offline. Brynn Putnam raised funds for Board, a startup focused on in-person gaming experiences.

cards.title: Mira Murati Steps Into Spotlight Post-OpenAI
cards.body: Mira Murati is increasing her public visibility as former OpenAI CTO. In the current AI landscape, staying low-profile has diminishing returns for maintaining market relevance.

cards.title: Anthropic's Amodei Dismisses AI Returns Concerns
cards.body: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic CEO Daniela Amodei shrugged off doubts about AI's investment returns. The company continues its dramatic growth trajectory with strong revenue expansion.

cards.title: StrictlyVC LA Hosts Defense Tech and AI Summit
cards.body: Investors, founders, and tech leaders will gather June 18 at The Aerospace Corporation Campus for StrictlyVC Los Angeles. The event explores consequential shifts in venture capital, defense tech, and AI.

cards.title: Token costs force AI industry to implement guardrails
cards.body: The AI industry is shifting from rapid growth to cost control as token expenses spiral. Companies are now prioritizing sustainability over "move fast" culture.

cards.title: Anthropic's revenue hits $47B annualized ahead of IPO
cards.body: Anthropic announced annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from $9 billion at end of 2025. The company faces a real test in proving its trajectory is sustainable.

cards.title: Poke becomes first AI agent on Apple Messages Business
cards.body: Poke, which enables AI agents through text messages, is now approved for Apple's Messages for Business platform. This marks a significant milestone for AI agent integration in Apple's ecosystem.

cards.title: Meta rolls out AI creator assistant for Facebook
cards.body: Meta launched a new AI assistant helping creators get quick performance insights without parsing dashboards. Creators can now ask questions like "When should I post?" and get instant answers.

cards.title: Lovable expands Google Cloud deal by 5x with Claude
cards.body: Lovable signed a multiyear expansion deal with Google Cloud involving a 5x increase in usage. The deal also includes expanded access to Anthropic's Claude AI model.

cards.title: Alphabet raises record $85B for Google AI business
cards.body: Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals strong investor appetite for AI-related offerings. The move demonstrates confidence in Google's AI expansion strategy.

cards.title: Google's Dreambeans turns your life into AI cartoons
cards.body: Dreambeans is Google's new AI tool that generates illustrated "stories" from your personal Google account data. The whimsically-named feature curates AI-generated visual narratives.

cards.title: Amazon shows AI-generated product images in search
cards.body: Amazon will use visual search and AI to display AI-generated product images matching user queries. The retailer claims this helps guide users to relevant products.

cards.title: Voice AI startup handles 17K calls daily in Africa
cards.body: Two former Goldman and Meta founders built a voice AI stack for African and Middle Eastern markets. Their platform now handles over 17,000 calls per day.

cards.title: UK regulators require Google AI Search opt-out tool
cards.body: UK regulators mandate Google provide publishers with opt-out tools for generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the UK then rolled out globally.

cards.title: Meta AI agent exploited to steal Instagram accounts
cards.body: Attackers used Meta's AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts by requesting account transfers. The hack exposed significant security gaps in AI agent deployment.

cards.title: AI chatbots impact our brain's attention and control
cards.body: Psychologists studying human-AI interaction find chatbots significantly affect cognitive control and focus. This raises important questions about AI's effect on brain function.

cards.title: Courts overwhelmed by flood of AI-generated lawsuits
cards.body: Federal judges are struggling with unprecedented numbers of AI-generated legal documents from self-represented litigants. Courts must adapt procedures to handle this new volume efficiently.

cards.title: Virtual power plants could power AI data centers
cards.body: Google signed a deal with Voltus to help fund virtual power plants supporting data centers. This approach could offset massive AI infrastructure energy demands.

cards.title: Small businesses leverage AI for admin operations
cards.body: AI can now handle accounting, design, market research, and product development for small businesses. This democratizes access to capabilities previously requiring specialized staff.

cards.title: Agentic AI transforms global healthcare delivery
cards.body: Healthcare systems facing chronic underinvestment and staffing gaps are turning to agentic AI solutions. AI agents help bridge care provision gaps and improve patient outcomes.

cards.title: LLMs best at resisting Russian propaganda
cards.body: Research identifies which large language models are most effective at resisting Russian propaganda attempts. This benchmark helps assess AI robustness against information manipulation.
